MessageType.description: Type of message in the agent workflow.
MessageType.title: MessageType

description:
Message exchanged between agents and orchestrator.

Design improvements:
- Discriminated union via message_type for polymorphic serialization
- Auto-timestamps with timezone awareness
- Computed properties for common checks
- Content truncation helper for logging

correlation_id.description: ID to correlate related messages across workflow
correlation_id.title: Correlation Id

message_type.description: Type of message for discriminated union

title: AgentMessage
